revision.comment: Replace {{[[Template:CatPair|CatPair]]}} or {{[[Template:CatRel|CatRel]]}} with {{[[Template:Navseasoncats|Navseasoncats]]}} (avoid gaps > navbar size & successive name mismatches)
revision.text:
This [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] is for [[Wikipedia:Article|articles]] on [[history]] [[books]] [[Publishing|published]] in the [[10th century]]. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:History books by century|10]] [[Category:10th-century books|History]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
